headline: Who's Running Northport
comment: SAMPLE / illustrative content only — no real people, places, or organizations. A candidate-roster ('who's who') panel à la Kornacki: a vertical stack of a few LARGE rows, each a portrait tile + a proportional metric block carrying the big name and a hero value. Portraits are generated deterministic duotone monogram placeholders (initials), never fabricated photos. `metric` is the comparable value each row encodes as block width (direction §5.13 rosters-encode-their-metric); `metricLabel` names the unit and `metricDisplay` is the preformatted hero value. Keep this to ~4-5 faces — a wall of portraits transmits nothing on air.
